rows.text:
Thank you @GovSherrillNJ for cooperating with us to help restore law and order.

We support every Americans constitutional right to peacefully protest. No one has the right to RIOT and ASSAULT law enforcement.

We hope to build on this partnership and work together to remove the worst of the worst from New Jersey communities.

rows.text:
For those wondering why I’m such a hardliner on mass deportations, it’s stories like the UK grooming gangs. 

Young girls as young as 11 systematically drugged, gang raped by dozens of men for years, threatened with death, families terrorized, while authorities looked the other way to avoid ‘racism’ accusations.

Our politicians lack courage. 

They see predictable crimes coming and still choose to protect the perpetrators over their own people. 

That’s why remigration isn’t extreme, it’s necessary. Protect our kids first @elonmusk

rows.text:
ICE arrested Tirso Gomez-Gomez, of Guatemala, at the Washington County Jail in Hurricane, Utah, where he’d been serving time for forcible sexual abuse.

➡️Under @SecMullinDHS, ICE law enforcement is focused on delivering the President’s mandate to the American people to remove murderers, child predators, rapists, gang members and terrorists from American communities. ICE will hold Gomez pending removal proceedings.
